channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Data shows migrants aren't taking 'Black jobs' or 'Hispanic jobs,' despite what Trump says
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ted Cruz and Colin Allred wage another big US Senate fight in Texas
item.description: Republicans have a stranglehold on every statewide elected office in Texas and control the state Supreme Court, both chambers of the Legislature and both U.S. Senate seats.
item.dc:creator: Sean Murphy And Juan A. Lozano, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Comer slams Raskin over his election certification comments: 'Ultimate hypocrite'
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) condemned comments from Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.), calling him “the ultimate hypocrite” after the Democrat claimed former President Trump is trying to manipulate the electoral college.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Tameka Henry discusses oversight, safety, and leadership in Clark County School District race
item.description: Tameka Henry, a candidate for the Clark County Board of Trustees, appeared on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide to discuss her platform and vision for improving the school district.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's campaign requests military aircraft and armored vehicles in response to threats from Iran
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Donald Trump 's aides have requested a slew of stepped-up security measures, including military aircraft capable of shooting down surface-to-air missiles to transport the former president in the race’s final stretch, amid growing concerns over threats from Iran in a campaign already
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics: 'Brothers' for Kamala
item.description: The latest updates from the 2024 campaign trail, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: U.S. expands sanctions on Iran in response to its ballistic attack on Israel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. on Friday announced new sanctions on Iran's energy sector in response to its Oct. 1 attack on Israel when it fired roughly 180 missiles into the country.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 in 5 millennials want full access to abortion: Study
item.description: The largest percentile of individuals who do not want to live in a "fully legal" abortion state is Gen Z at 33%, followed by Gen X and Baby Boomers (30%).
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Vladimir Putin meets with Iranian President Pezeshkian to celebrate 'very close' relationship
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin met with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Friday, hailing the "very close" relationship between Russia and Iran.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lead counsel hits new Dem effort to 'delegitimize' Supreme Court amid senator's report on Kavanaugh probe
item.description: The former chief nominations counsel for Republicans during Brett Kavanaugh's Supreme Court confirmation is crying foul on a report from Democrats alleging the Trump administration constrained the FBI's probe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk said the “Cybercab” doesn’t have steering wheels or pedals.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Senate candidates steer clear of debates
item.description: Senate candidates this cycle are largely steering clear of the debate stage, in some cases avoiding it altogether, marking a major change from past years as campaigns question the debates' importance. For years, it was common for top Senate races to feature multiple debates.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alaska, Colorado, Massachusetts begin absentee voting
item.description: Alaska, Colorado and Massachusetts began early voting on Friday. Here is all the information you need to cast a ballot. Forty-four states and Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The drownings of 2 Navy SEALs were preventable, military investigation finds
item.description: The highly critical report concluded there were “deficiencies, gaps and inconsistencies” in training and policies.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: US House control teeters on the unlikely battleground of heavily Democratic California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — California’s reputation as a hothouse of progressive politics is being tested in a string of U.S. House contests that are again expected to play into which party controls the chamber next year.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris rips Trump for his criticism of federal storm response and calls for 'dignity'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris and the White House criticized Donald Trump for his attacks on the federal response to Hurricanes Helene and Milton and suggested he was wrongly trying to turn the deadly storms to his political advantage.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA VOLMERT, DARLENE SUPERVILLE and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah candidates for Mitt Romney's open US Senate seat debate approaches to climate change
item.description: OGDEN, Utah (AP) — The Republican and Democratic candidates vying for Mitt Romney’s open U.S. Senate seat sought to convince Utah voters on Thursday that they have the better blueprint to tackle climate change and protect the state's vast natural resources. Republican U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's complaints about '60 Minutes' put a spotlight on editing at the nation's top newsmagazine
item.description: Donald Trump skipped a “60 Minutes” interview this past week, but he's attacking CBS for how it handled its session with opponent Kamala Harris, calling it a “giant fake news scam” and suggesting the network was out to protect her.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon could resign: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Less than a month after the NYPD's interim commissioner was appointed, another major shake-up could be coming. Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to step down, sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Candidate Kamilah Bywaters discusses her vision for the Clark County School Board
item.description: Kamilah Bywaters, a candidate for the Clark County School District (CCSD) Board of Trustees, joined 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide to discuss her plans and priorities for District E, which covers Summerlin and northwest parts of the Las Vegas Valley.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump-Putin ties are back in the spotlight after new book describes calls
item.description: A new book's assertion that former President Donald Trump may have had as many as seven private phone calls with Russian President Vladimir Putin since leaving the White House has refocused attention on their politically fraught relationship and on Trump's sustained dialogue with world leaders as he
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Election drop boxes open in San Diego County
item.description: While mail ballots are expected to arrive this week for registered voters, 150 official ballot drop boxes opened Tuesday in San Diego County for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Harris, Walz appeared on ABC's 'The View' and 'Jimmy Kimmel Live'
item.description: The Democratic presidential ticket is on a media blitz in New York. Vice President Kamala Harris appeared Tuesday on ABC's “The View," and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz appeared on ABC's “Jimmy Kimmel Live” on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: Melania Trump is waving off speculation that she didn't want to hold her husband's hand, chalking up images of her seemingly "swatting" away former President Donald Trump to a "mere misunderstanding.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Business groups push back after Walz says they supported paid leave program
item.description: While some small business owners advocated for a government-managed leave proposal, the state’s largest business groups sought to block the proposal in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: U.S. Treasury says tribally owned entities should be tax-exempt
item.description: Proposed new guidelines would clarify the decades-old question of whether tribal businesses or entities are exempt from federal taxes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Harris leads Trump among California Latino voters by 23 points
item.description: Vice President Harris holds a strong lead over former President Trump among California Hispanics, according to a Telemundo poll released Tuesday. The California survey contrasts with a similar poll released earlier this month of Florida Hispanic voters, which found Trump leading Harris.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton may be October surprise in presidential battle
item.description: Strategists in both parties are looking back to Hurricane Sandy, which slammed into the mid-Atlantic states shortly before Election Day 2012.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Harris is pressed for more specifics in a wide-ranging interview with '60 Minutes'
item.description: The interview followed criticism from former President Donald Trump that Kamala Harris has been unwilling to sit for hard interviews. She was pressed on everything from her economic proposals to immigration.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Pro-Trump Christian nationalists are on tour to recruit election workers
item.description: “Are you guys ready to show the world that Christians will be silent no more?” said one speaker, whose nonprofit is recruiting people to become election workers.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Hagen and Audrey Nguyen, MPR News

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Trump intends to use military to round up opponents: Michael Cohen
item.description: “The big warning that I want people to understand is when Donald Trump says something, stop sane washing it. Stop trying to make it into something which has some normalcy to it. What he says, he intends to do.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
